options.name: --bundle
options.description: Bundle all dependencies into the output files

options.name: --define
options.description: Replace variable names with a literal value, eg. --define:DEBUG=true

options.name: --external
options.description: Exclude modules from the build

options.name: --format
options.description: The output format

options.name: --loader
options.description: For a given file extension, specify a loader

options.name: --minify
options.description: Minify the output (sets all the --minify-* options)

options.name: --outdir
options.description: The output directory for multiple entrypoints

options.name: --outfile
options.description: The output file for one entrypoint

options.name: --platform
options.description: The platform target

options.name: --serve
options.description: Start a local HTTP server on this host:port

options.name: --splitting
options.description: Enable code splitting

options.name: --target
options.description: Set the environment target. Can be a particular ES version or browser version, eg. chrome101

options.name: --watch
options.description: Rebuild on file system changes

options.name: --allow-overwrite
options.description: Allow output files to overwrite input files

options.name: --analyze
options.description: Print a report about the contents of the bundle

options.name: --asset-names
options.description: Path template for 'file' loader files

options.name: --banner
options.description: Text to be prepended to each output file type

options.name: --charset
options.description: Use UTF-8 instead of escaped codepoints in ASCII

options.name: --chunk-names
options.description: Path template to use for code splitting chunks

options.name: --color
options.description: Force use of terminal colors

options.name: --drop
options.description: Remove certain constructs

options.name: --entry-names
options.description: Path template to use for entry point output paths

options.name: --footer
options.description: Text to be appended to each file type

options.name: --global-name
options.description: The name of the global if using --format=iife

options.name: --ignore-annotations
options.description: Enable this to work with packages that have incorrect tree-shaking annotations

options.name: --inject
options.description: Import the file into all input files, automatically replace matching globals

options.name: --jsx-factory
options.description: What to use for the JSX factory

options.name: --jsx-fragment
options.description: What to use for the JS Fragment factory

options.name: --jsx
options.description: Preserve JSX instead of transforming

options.name: --keep-names
options.description: Preserve 'name' on functions and classes

options.name: --legal-comments
options.description: Where to place legal comments

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the log level

options.name: --log-limit
options.description: Maximum message count, 0 to disable

options.name: --log-override
options.description: For a particular identifier, set the log level

options.name: --main-fields
options.description: Override the main file order in package.json

options.name: --mangle-cache
options.description: Save 'mangle props' decisions to a JSON file

options.name: --mangle-props
options.description: Rename all properties matching a regular expression

options.name: --mangle-quoted
options.description: Enable mangling (renaming) quoted properties

options.name: --metafile
options.description: Write metadata about the build to a JSON file

options.name: --minify-whitespace
options.description: Remove unnecessary whitespace in output files

options.name: --minify-identifiers
options.description: Shorten identifiers in output files

options.name: --minify-syntax
options.description: Use equivalent but shorter syntax in output files

options.name: --out-extension
options.description: Use a custom output extension for each extension

options.name: --outbase
options.description: Base path used to determine entrypoint output paths, for multiple entrypoints

options.name: --preserve-symlinks
options.description: Disable symlink resolution

options.name: --public-path
options.description: Set the base URL for the 'file' loader

options.name: --pure
options.description: Mark the name as a pure function for tree shaking

options.name: --reserve-props
options.description: Do not mangle these properties

options.name: --resolve-extensions
options.description: Comma-separated list of implicit extensions

options.name: --servedir
options.description: What to serve in addition to the generated output files

options.name: --source-root
options.description: Set the sourceRoot field in generated source maps

options.name: --sourcefile
options.description: Set the source file for the source map if there's no file name to use

options.name: --sourcemap
options.description: Generate source maps?

suggestions.name: external
suggestions.description: Generate a separate .map.js file with no comment

suggestions.name: inline
suggestions.description: Append source maps to JS files

options.name: --sources-content
options.description: Omit the sourcesContent field in generated source maps

options.name: --supported
options.description: Consider a given syntax to be supported

options.name: --tree-shaking
options.description: Force tree shaking on or off

options.name: --tsconfig
options.description: Use this TypeScript config instead of the default

options.name: --version
options.description: Print the current version and exit
